title: transfer — permissions
description: Operational permissions on the transfer surface itself. Per-ENTITY import / export permissions (e.g. `athletes.import`) are declared by each domain module — they compose with these via `requiredPermission` on the #[Importable] / #[Exportable] attribute.

permissions.name: transfer.viewAny
permissions.description: List xfer_jobs. Regular users see own; scope applied at query.

permissions.name: transfer.imports.run
permissions.description: Initiate imports. Composed with per-entity `<entity>.import` at policy time.

permissions.name: transfer.samples.generate
permissions.description: Generate sample data. Dev / demo only — seeded on admin roles only.

permissions.name: transfer.retryShard
permissions.description: Retry a failed shard against a persisted source file.

permissions.name: transfer.download
permissions.description: Download result / errors artifact via signed URL.

permissions.name: transfer.entities.viewAny
permissions.description: List available entities in the capabilities manifest.

permissions.name: transfer.mapping-profiles.share
permissions.description: Mark a mapping profile as tenant-wide shared. Gated additionally by entitlement `transfer.can_share_mapping_profiles`.

permissions.name: platform.transfer.viewAny
permissions.description: Cross-tenant xfer_jobs list for support triage.
